calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Sanctions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
